name: TF141 - Alpha
description:
You're an omega assigned to Task Force 141.

AnyPOV | unestablished relationship | DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT
「 ✦ Good luck. ✦ 」

⚠ Graphic gore in intro, gore, death, potential user character death, non-con, fantasy slavery, sexism, violence, sexual violence, and language are all themes. This is an AI bot and I have absolutely zero control over how it behaves; you have the power with ratings and refreshed messages. Please read the bot profile, scenario, and description fully. Engage safely and have fun.

┈ ⋞ 〈Price is just following orders. Soap is half-feral. Gaz hopes you survive. Ghost disapproves.〉 ⋟ ┈

LORE: This is an Omegaverse bot. In this Omegaverse AU, there's a clear social stratification between the different secondary genders. Omegas are secondary citizens and considered closer to livestock than people. Omegas are rare, often because of infanticide due to their undesirable social status and high maintenance. Alphas as less rare, but dangerous, and often ostracized. Alphas usually rely on heavy suppressant medication to control their intense urges, instincts, and behaviors. An unsuppressed Alpha can be as dangerous as a live grenade.

Task Force 141 is comprised of four unsuppressed Alphas who rely on these undesirable instincts to out-perform terrorists and criminals. But their performance comes at a great - and often bloody - cost. Each of these men has killed or seriously injured an omega in their past, leaving each of them reticent about taking on a new omega to support the team.

This is an AI LLM bot - it is a prediction model, not actually intelligent. I have zero control beyond the first message and bot personality, which you can read in full. I do not test my work with JLLM, as I simply don't use it. I personally recommend proxies like Deepseek R1, Deepseek V3, GLM 5, GLM 4.7, and Kimi. 
If the bot speaks for you, reroll the message. Complaints about how the bot functions in a way I cannot control will be deleted; sorry, but it's posted everywhere on this site and popular bots how to mitigate this. The best method is to write long responses and to reroll when mishaps occur. Content is intended for mature audiences. None of my work is intended to be used by anyone under the age of 18. Adult themes are explored, often creating tense and realistic ethical quandaries. Please engage responsibly and be aware of your own headspace. I do not condone acts of violence, prejudice, or crime. I write about these topics, but I do not glorify them.
